content.en:
With the passage of time, Ye Tian's Desolate Dragon Star Aperture gradually improved.

After a thousand domain years, the Desolate Dragon Star Aperture was completely completed, and the Desolate Dragon Mark was condensed.

This also made his body stronger, and he also obtained the second supreme domain body secret art, the Eye of the Desolate Dragon.

Once unleashed, the Eye of the Desolate Dragon, a secret technique of the Supreme Domain, can hold the body of someone else, play a key role in battle, and can also prevent the enemy from escaping.

It can be said that this Supreme Domain Secret Technique is very good.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian went to the multi-dimensional stars one by one, absorbing the energy of the multi-dimensional stars to cultivate his supreme dimensional domain body astral aperture.

Time flies.

More than 30,000 domain yuan years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already cultivated the thirty-two and six star apertures to the consummation realm, and he had also obtained thirty-six supreme domain body secret techniques, and the supreme dimensional domain body had skyrocketed to an extremely exaggerated level.

Now, his strength is far beyond the past.

Other than that.

In terms of the Supreme Dimension Rules, he had now comprehended the Triple Supreme Dimension Rules, and this progress was already very fast.

As for cultivation, he had just broken through to the middle realm of the Eighth Realm. 15

And he is about to create his own Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, and his Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Absolute Technique is also related to his own Supreme Dimensional Domain, based on the power of three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional astral bodies, forming a painting, thus bursting out with terrifying power.

He named this Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Sect Zhou Tian Duowei Painting!

This Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Technique involves suppression, blockade, and killing power, once it is hit by Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting, it is immediately pulled in, and it is constantly strangled by the power of more than 300 multi-dimensional stars, and it is extremely difficult to get out of the predicament.

Since the creation of this Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Sect, Ye Tian's strength has been almost invincible in the Eighth Realm.

His cultivation is a little worse now, but it doesn't affect too much combat power, plus his supreme dimensional domain body, he can definitely fight with the weaker ninth realm now.

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian was very excited.

Only now does he have a little self-preservation.

Of course, his current strength is definitely not as good as the Purple Yun Realm Lord, and the Purple Yun Realm Lord now has the strength to kill the Ordinary Ninth Realm, and he is still far behind!

......

Basalt.

This is a multidimensional star in the seventeenth dimension.

this day.

The Hanging Night Realm Lord at the beginning of the Ninth Realm came here and gradually approached the Xuanwu Star, which is a very special multi-dimensional star, and the breath of the Xuanwu Star helps to improve cultivation and temper the body, although the effect is not as good as that of the Fog Pluto.

However, the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm cultivates a special supreme dimensional rule secret technique, which mainly strengthens defense, and requires the energy of the Xuanwu Star to increase this secret art.

Therefore, the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm often came here to cultivate.

Soon.

He arrived at the Xuanwu Star and cultivated in the right place.

Time passed slowly.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

The Xuanwu Star shook, directly causing the expression of the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm to change drastically.

This is a multi-dimensional star body Xuanwu Star, even if it is an existence in the ninth realm, he does not dare to get too close to it, let alone enter the interior of the Xuanwu Star.

To be able to make the Xuanwu Star shake, this matter is not simple.

The Night Hanging Realm Lord was frightened and retreated some distance, and then stared at Xuanwu Star.

Click!!!

A vine emerged from the basalt star and spread.

The vine was purple-red, huge, and hideous.

However.

When the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm saw this vine, he did not panic at all, but was extremely excited.

"This is a multi-dimensional supreme thing!"

He'd heard of the multidimensional supreme thing, but he had never obtained it!

He never expected that this kind of thing would be encountered by him.

"The multi-dimensional supreme thing, and it is such a huge multi-dimensional supreme thing, its value is unimaginable, if I obtain it, I can completely rise, and even let the forces behind me rise!"

The Lord of the Hanging Night Realm was very excited, and he wanted to rush up immediately to snatch this vine.

But he quickly calmed down.

"No, this is Xuanwuxing, if I get too close, I will be sucked by Xuanwuxing, and I will definitely die at that time!"

The Lord of the Hanging Night Realm began to think about how he could obtain this multi-dimensional supreme object.

Thinking about it, there is no way.

Even if he could arrange the formation, the formation that he wanted to grab from this multi-dimensional supreme thing from the Xuanwu Star was not something he could arrange.

"I can only choose to cooperate with other Ninth Realms, and maybe I can obtain this multi-dimensional supreme thing!"

The Lord of the Hanging Night Realm thought to himself.

So, he left here, leaving from the seventeenth dimension and returning to the Upper Realm.

......

Upper domain.

Multidimensional Frontier No. 60.

Peacock Xuanguo.

The Peacock Xuan Kingdom is a huge kingdom composed of three million extradimensional realms, established by the Peacock Clan, a superdimensional life race.

But up to now, there are also many cultivators with peacock bloodline in the Peacock Xuanguo, as well as other extradimensional creatures with peacock blood.

The Lord of the Hanging Night Realm came to the Peacock Xuanguo and visited the ancestor of the Peacock Xuanguo 323, the Peacock Realm Lord of the Ninth Realm.

The strength of this Peacock Realm Lord is very strong, much stronger than the Hanging Night Realm Lord, but their relationship is very good, and the Hanging Night Realm Lord has come to visit the Peacock Realm Lord.

The cultivation place of the Peacock Realm Lord.

The Night Hanging Realm Lord met the Peacock Realm Lord.

"I've seen the Peacock Realm Lord!"

The Night Hanging Night Realm Lord said respectfully.

"Old friend, what are you looking for me, and you are visiting me in person?"

The Peacock Realm Lord wondered.

Usually, if there is something, it is enough to summon it, but today I came in person, it should not be a trivial matter.

The Night Hanging Realm Lord said, "Peacock Realm Lord, I have discovered a multi-dimensional supreme thing, can I be interested in joining forces?"

"Where is the multidimensional supreme thing?"

The Peacock Realm Lords were all excited.

"Peacock Realm Lord, although we are friends, but if we cooperate, we must also have the appearance of cooperation, let's make an oath, after we succeed, we will each have half of each, how about it?"

The strength of the Hanging Night Realm Lord is too weak, he is far from being the opponent of the Peacock Realm Lord, if he gets that treasure, if the Peacock Realm Lord doesn't give it to him, he can't do anything.

So, it's better to score clearly.

"No problem!"

The Peacock Realm Lord immediately made an oath with the Night Hanging Night Realm Lord.

The oath was made, and the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm would no longer hide it, and directly say the multi-dimensional supreme thing!.
